subject: Make several fixes + enhancemenets
commit_message:
Make several fixes + enhancemenets

* Fix streams typo
* Support ports including multiple ports
* Add ability to print blueprint to screen
* Apply fixes to the blueprintToString
* Expose always_pull_image

Change-Id: I1e42e7686178033aee400fa27313bd5501a69ca2
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1873
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1859
Signed-off-by: Michael Hwang <mhwang@research.att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

This work has been tested in integration tests (blueprints used for deployments in Dublin DCAE runtime) but I caution that I'm not knowledgeable with this code base so my changes here might not be the best formed.  Some or all of these changes will need to be ported over to el-alto++ BPG whose code base seems substantially different in implementation.

Abandoned

This patch is primarily for reference to port needed fix part of MOD deliverable for Frankfurt.
